name: local-rag
description: Ingest files for retrieval augmented generation (RAG) with open-source Large Language Models (LLMs), all without 3rd parties or sensitive data leaving your network.

commit.message:
Remove unnecessary system prompt

This can be set in the Ollama LLM but is not used by Llama-Index.

commit.message: Allow embeddings to use cuda devices
Set additional options on Query Engine
Only clean-up files for upload use-case
Use GPU for embeddings if present
Select llama2:7b as default on load

Sample ROCm docker-compose

Un-tested until I can source an AMD gpu
Ignore logs when building Docker images
Update volume syntax to support Windows

Sample method to stream the first message upon load

Unfortunately this is a blocking operation and it may impact performance. Leaving as reference for now.
Prevent chat without pre-requisites being set

releases.name: Bug Fixes & Dependency Updates
releases.body:
## What's Changed
* Switch to cache_resource for Document Index by @JoepdeJong in https://github.com/jonfairbanks/local-rag/pull/54
* Fixes application crash when models not found by @cybertechy in https://github.com/jonfairbanks/local-rag/pull/58
* Bug Fixes and Dependency Updates by @jonfairbanks in https://github.com/jonfairbanks/local-rag/pull/62

## New Contributors
* @JoepdeJong made their first contribution in https://github.com/jonfairbanks/local-rag/pull/54
* @cybertechy made their first contribution in https://github.com/jonfairbanks/local-rag/pull/58

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jonfairbanks/local-rag/compare/v1.4.2...v1.4.3

releases.name: Security Update
releases.body:
## Updates

This update resolves a critical command injection vulnerability present in `llama-index`, an underlying dependency.

https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-3271

## What's Changed
* Security Update by @jonfairbanks in https://github.com/jonfairbanks/local-rag/pull/45


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jonfairbanks/local-rag/compare/v1.4.0...v1.4.1

releases.body: ## What's Changed * Website RAG, UX Improvements & Bug Fixes by @jonfairbanks in https://github.com/jonfairbanks/local-rag/pull/22 * Fix workflow versioning by @jonfairbanks in https://github.com/jonfairbanks/local-rag/pull/23 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jonfairbanks/local-rag/compare/1.3.1...v1.3.1

readme_html:
📚 Local RAG

Offline, Open-Source RAG

Ingest files for retrieval augmented generation (RAG) with open-source Large Language Models (LLMs), all without 3rd parties or sensitive data leaving your network.

Features:

  • Offline Embeddings & LLMs Support (No OpenAI!)
  • Support for Multiple Sources
    • Local Files
    • GitHub Repos
    • Websites
  • Streaming Responses
  • Conversational Memory
  • Chat Export

Learn More:

  • Setup & Deploy the App
  • Using Local RAG
  • RAG Pipeline
  • Planned Features
  • Troubleshooting
  • Known Bugs & Issues
  • Resources
  • Contributing
